clienttweaks.configuration.title: Client Tweaks
clienttweaks.configuration.mobility.auto: This option will let you climb ladders automatically by just looking upwards, rather than requiring a key to be held down.
clienttweaks.configuration.mobility.disa: This option will disable step assist added by other mods.
clienttweaks.configuration.rendering.hid: This option will hide your offhand item. It can be toggled via an optional key binding.
This option will hide your empty main hand in first person.
This option will hide both first person hands. It can be toggled via an optional key binding.
This option will hide your own potion particle effects for your client (other players will still see them).
This option will hide your shield unless you are holding a weapon.
This option will hide your shield unless you are actively blocking.
clienttweaks.configuration.torches.noOff: This prevents torches from being placed from your offhand at all.
This prevents torches from being placed from your offhand if you have a block in your main hand.
This prevents torches from being placed from your offhand if you have food in your main hand.
No Offhand Torch With Empty Hand
This prevents torches from being placed from your off hand if you have an empty main hand.
clienttweaks.configuration.torches.offha: This restricts torches to be placed from the offhand only when you're holding a tool in your main hand.
clienttweaks.configuration.torches.doNot: This prevents the last torch in the offhand from being placed.
This option will disable log stripping.
This option will disable log stripping unless the player is holding shift.
This prevents items from being used from your offhand if you have food in your main hand.
Disable Paving with Block in Offhand
This option will disable paving when holding a block in your offhand.
No Offhand Fireworks With Elytra Unless Airborne
This prevents fireworks from being launched from your off hand if you are wearing an Elytra, unless you're flying.
Berry Placement Requires Shift or Dirt
This prevents sweet berries from being placed unless the player is holding shift or placing them on dirt or farmland.
clienttweaks.configuration.building.pane: This option will make iron fences and glass panes have a bigger hitbox while placing them, making it easier to aim.
clienttweaks.configuration.building.chai: This option will make chains have a bigger hitbox while placing them, making it easier to aim.
clienttweaks.configuration.ui.masterVolu: This adds back the master volume slider to the options screen. Saves you a click!
clienttweaks.configuration.ui.musicVolum: This adds back the music volume slider to the options screen. Saves you a click!
clienttweaks.configuration.ui.alwaysPrio: Prioritizes the experience bar info to show instead of the locator bar. Best toggled with the keybind if you care about the locater bar.
clienttweaks.configuration.recipeBook.no: This option makes the recipe book not shift the inventory when opened. Works best with smaller GUI scales / bigger resolutions.
clienttweaks.configuration.recipeBook.cl: This option makes right clicking the recipe book search bar clear it.
clienttweaks.configuration.recipeBook.na: This option makes clicking ghost ingredients in the crafting grid navigate to it in the recipe book.
clienttweaks.configuration.recipeBook.re: This option retains recipe book search text when reopening the recipe book.
clienttweaks.configuration.mining.preven: Prevents accidental mining of certain fragile blocks like budding amethysts.
clienttweaks.configuration.mining.doNotU: This prevents the last durability from being used up.
This option will increase the hitbox of random-offset blocks in creative mode, making it easier to break them quickly.
This option makes right clicking the creative menu search bar clear it.
This option retains creative menu search text when reopening the creative menu search tab.
